description: Button that sets input values then runs a variable animator animation. When only setvalue is provided, animation is derived from current value to new value. When animator ref is provided, uses the animator's from/to values.
utility: Create a button that sets values then runs an animator animation

arguments.name: setvalues
arguments.description: One or more setvalue() expressions to apply before animating

arguments.name: animatorRef
arguments.description: Reference to an existing variable animator or shape animator. Uses the animator's from/to values

arguments.name: display
arguments.description: Button text. Second string shown while playing

alternates.description: Animate from current to new value
Set value then use animator's animation

examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(10, 10), size(25), range(-5, 5), type(geometry))
V = vector(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, 3, 4))
va = vectoranimator(V, vector(G, point(G, 0, 0), point(G, -2, 5)), defer())
btn_1 = playinputanimator(at(4, 16), va, t(5), display("Animate Vector A"))

G = g2d(at(10, 10), 25, 25, range(-5, 5), range(-5, 5), type(plotting))
a = 1
f = plot(G, "a*x^2")
btn_1 = playinputanimator(at(6, 16), setvalue(a, 10), t(6), display("Animate"))
